ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated SEP-13-1990 is admitted to probate. Clifford G. Trautman is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Status on close of estate is set for APR-12-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by MAR-29-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
